jtbds.title: Onboard a new employee
jtbds.situation: offer accepted; hr admin must provision systems, collect new-hire paperwork, schedule orientation, and ensure the employee is productive on day 1
jtbds.motivation: deliver a consistent onboarding experience that accelerates time-to-productivity and prevents I-9 / compliance failures
jtbds.outcome: employee active in HRIS, I-9 verified, all required training completed, day-1 access provisioned
success_criteria: I-9 Section 1 completed on or before first day; Section 2 within 3 business days
federal and state tax withholding elections collected before first payroll
required compliance training assigned within first week
IT access provisioned before or on start date

jtbds.title: Process employee resignation and offboarding
jtbds.situation: employee submits resignation; HR must acknowledge, conduct exit interview, revoke access, process final pay, and ensure knowledge transfer
jtbds.motivation: execute a clean separation that protects company assets, meets final pay laws, and preserves goodwill where possible
jtbds.outcome: access revoked, final paycheck issued on time, COBRA notice sent, exit interview completed
success_criteria: system access revoked within 24 hours of last day
final paycheck issued on next regular pay date or per state law
COBRA notice mailed within 14 days of qualifying event
equipment returned and asset tracker updated before last day

jtbds.title: Manage annual performance review cycle
jtbds.situation: annual review cycle opens; HRBP must coordinate self-assessments, manager evaluations, calibration sessions, and merit decisions within the review window
jtbds.motivation: complete fair, documented evaluations on time to unlock merit increases and identify development needs
jtbds.outcome: all employees rated, calibration completed, ratings communicated, merit increases approved and staged for payroll
success_criteria: 100% of employee self-assessments submitted within review window
all manager evaluations completed within 5 business days of window close
calibration sessions completed before merit decisions
employees notified of final rating within 5 business days of calibration

jtbds.title: Handle employee leave request (FMLA/ADA/PTO)
jtbds.situation: employee requests leave for medical, family, military, or personal reasons; HR must determine eligibility, designate leave type, coordinate with manager, and track intermittent usage
jtbds.motivation: ensure employee receives all legally protected leave while minimizing operational disruption and preventing unlawful interference
jtbds.outcome: leave designated (FMLA, ADA, state, PTO), return-to-work date confirmed, payroll updated, medical documentation retained securely
success_criteria: FMLA eligibility notice sent within 5 business days of leave request
designation notice sent within 5 business days of sufficient medical documentation
intermittent leave tracked accurately against 12-week entitlement
medical documentation stored separate from personnel file

jtbds.title: Process employee promotion
jtbds.situation: manager recommends an employee for promotion; HRBP must validate against grade criteria, conduct pay equity review, obtain approvals, and update HRIS and payroll
jtbds.motivation: reward high performers equitably and consistently while maintaining internal pay equity and budget compliance
jtbds.outcome: promotion approved, new title and compensation effective on target date, HRIS updated, offer letter issued
success_criteria: pay equity review completed before approval
new compensation within approved pay band for target grade
HRIS updated before effective date
employee notification at least 5 business days before effective date

jtbds.title: Manage employee disciplinary action
jtbds.situation: manager reports a policy violation or performance issue; HRBP must investigate, determine appropriate action level, document, and deliver the action consistently with policy
jtbds.motivation: address misconduct fairly and consistently to protect the company from wrongful termination claims and maintain workplace standards
jtbds.outcome: disciplinary action documented and delivered, action plan agreed, follow-up scheduled
success_criteria: investigation completed before action delivered
employee given opportunity to respond before final action
progressive discipline documented in personnel file
union procedures followed if applicable

jtbds.title: Handle workplace harassment complaint
jtbds.situation: employee files a harassment or discrimination complaint; ER specialist must promptly investigate, maintain confidentiality, determine findings, and take remedial action
jtbds.motivation: protect the complainant from retaliation, resolve the matter lawfully, and prevent future incidents
jtbds.outcome: investigation completed, findings documented, remedial action taken, complainant notified of outcome
success_criteria: complaint acknowledged within 1 business day
investigation initiated within 3 business days
investigation completed within 30 business days
complainant and respondent both interviewed
no evidence of retaliation during or after investigation

jtbds.title: Process payroll change request
jtbds.situation: compensation event (salary change, bonus, garnishment, tax withholding update) must be reflected in the next payroll run; specialist must validate, enter, and audit changes
jtbds.motivation: ensure employees are paid correctly and on time while maintaining payroll data integrity and audit trails
jtbds.outcome: payroll change entered and audited, reflected in correct pay period, employee confirmation sent
success_criteria: change entered before payroll processing cutoff for the period
dual verification for compensation changes > $500/period
garnishment entered within 5 days of court order receipt
change log archived for audit

jtbds.title: Enroll employee in benefits
jtbds.situation: new hire, qualifying life event, or open enrollment period; benefits admin must verify eligibility, collect elections, submit to carriers, and confirm coverage activation
jtbds.motivation: ensure employees have correct coverage activated on time and elections are transmitted error-free to carriers
jtbds.outcome: benefits elected and transmitted to carriers, confirmation letters issued, payroll deductions staged
success_criteria: new hire enrollment window communicated within 3 days of start
elections transmitted to carrier within 5 business days of deadline
payroll deductions effective on correct pay date
ACA affordability calculation verified for health plans

jtbds.title: Conduct workforce reduction (RIF)
jtbds.situation: business decision to reduce headcount; HR must design selection criteria, conduct adverse impact analysis, prepare WARN Act notices, execute separations, and offer severance
jtbds.motivation: achieve target headcount reduction while minimizing legal exposure and preserving employee dignity
jtbds.outcome: affected employees notified with WARN compliance, severance agreements executed, ADEA waiver periods honored, HRIS updated
success_criteria: WARN Act notice issued 60 days before mass layoff if triggered
adverse impact analysis completed before final selection
ADEA waiver review period (21 days consideration, 7 days revocation) honored
severance payments issued per agreement timeline
COBRA notices mailed within 14 days

jtbds.title: Manage full-cycle recruitment
jtbds.situation: hiring manager submits requisition for open role; recruiter must create job posting, screen applicants, coordinate interviews, manage offer process, and initiate background check before start date
jtbds.motivation: fill the role with a qualified candidate within time-to-fill target while maintaining fair and legal hiring process
jtbds.outcome: offer accepted; background check cleared; onboarding initiated
success_criteria: requisition approved and posted within 3 business days
interview slate presented within 2 weeks
offer extended within 48 hours of final decision
background check initiated before offer acceptance

jtbds.title: Complete I-9 and E-Verify for new hire
jtbds.situation: new hire must complete Form I-9 within first day; documents must be inspected and verified; E-Verify case opened within 3 business days; tentative nonconfirmation process managed if triggered
jtbds.motivation: comply with IRCA and E-Verify MOU while onboarding new hire on schedule
jtbds.outcome: I-9 complete; E-Verify case closed as authorized; I-9 filed for retention period
success_criteria: Section 1 completed on or before first day
Section 2 completed by end of day 3
E-Verify case opened within 3 business days
TNC process managed per E-Verify requirements

jtbds.title: Manage FMLA leave
jtbds.situation: employee requests FMLA-qualifying leave; administrator must provide notices, obtain medical certification, track 12-week entitlement, coordinate benefit continuation, and manage return-to-work
jtbds.motivation: administer FMLA correctly to protect both employee rights and employer compliance
jtbds.outcome: FMLA designated; leave tracked; benefits continued; employee returned or separation processed
success_criteria: eligibility notice provided within 5 business days
designation notice provided within 5 days of medical certification
12-week entitlement tracked accurately
benefits continued per FMLA requirements

jtbds.title: Process ADA reasonable accommodation
jtbds.situation: employee or applicant requests accommodation for disability; HRBP must engage in interactive process, request medical documentation, evaluate undue hardship, implement approved accommodation
jtbds.motivation: meet ADA obligations while maintaining operational effectiveness
jtbds.outcome: accommodation determination documented; accommodation implemented or hardship denial with alternatives
success_criteria: interactive process initiated within 5 days of request
medical documentation requested
accommodation or denial decision documented
undue hardship analysis documented if denial

jtbds.title: Manage annual compensation review cycle
jtbds.situation: annual merit cycle requires building pay-range modeling, calibrating with managers, processing merit increases within budget, generating letters, and updating HRIS before effective date
jtbds.motivation: retain talent through competitive pay decisions while staying within compensation budget
jtbds.outcome: merit increases approved; letters generated; HRIS updated; payroll effective
success_criteria: merit budget allocated to managers
calibration sessions completed
all increases within approved range
letters generated and distributed
HRIS updated before payroll cutoff

jtbds.title: Investigate employee complaint
jtbds.situation: employee files complaint about manager conduct or policy violation; HRBP must intake complaint, interview parties, determine credibility, and recommend action
jtbds.motivation: address employee concerns fairly and consistently to reduce legal risk and preserve workplace trust
jtbds.outcome: investigation complete; credibility assessment documented; corrective action recommended; employee notified
success_criteria: complaint acknowledged within 2 business days
all parties interviewed within 10 days
credibility assessment documented
outcome communicated to complainant

jtbds.title: Administer COBRA continuation coverage
jtbds.situation: qualifying event triggers COBRA obligation; administrator must provide election notice within 44 days, track election and premium payments, notify carrier, and handle premium subsidy if applicable
jtbds.motivation: fulfill COBRA notice obligations and avoid DOL excise tax penalties
jtbds.outcome: election notice sent within 44 days; carrier notified; premium payments tracked
success_criteria: qualifying event notice received from employer
election notice sent within 44 days of qualifying event
carrier notified of elections
premium payments tracked and applied

jtbds.title: Process separation agreement and release
jtbds.situation: involuntary separation requires separation agreement with ADEA/OWBPA-compliant release; HR counsel drafts agreement, provides 21/45-day consideration period, tracks 7-day revocation window, and ensures consideration is adequate
jtbds.motivation: obtain valid release of claims while complying with ADEA/OWBPA requirements
jtbds.outcome: agreement executed after revocation period; severance paid per terms; EEO reporting updated
success_criteria: ADEA/OWBPA disclosures included
21-day (or 45-day for group) consideration period provided
7-day revocation window honored
severance paid after revocation period

jtbds.title: Manage employment visa sponsorship
jtbds.situation: sponsored employee needs H-1B, L-1, or PERM labor certification; coordinator manages attorney engagement, LCA filing, USCIS petition, and status tracking; cap-subject H-1B requires lottery registration
jtbds.motivation: retain international talent and maintain work authorization without gaps
jtbds.outcome: petition approved; I-94 extended; PERM filed or approved; employee notified of status
success_criteria: LCA filed and certified before petition
USCIS petition filed with correct supporting docs
status tracked through adjudication
employee notified of approval before I-94 expiry

jtbds.title: Manage annual benefits open enrollment
jtbds.situation: annual enrollment window requires carrier negotiation, rate finalization, employee communication campaign, enrollment system configuration, and election file submission to carriers before coverage effective date
jtbds.motivation: close enrollment on time with complete election data to avoid coverage gaps
jtbds.outcome: enrollment closed; elections submitted to all carriers; confirmations issued; HRIS updated
success_criteria: carrier rates finalized 60 days before enrollment
enrollment system configured and tested
all employee elections received
election files submitted to carriers before effective date

jtbds.title: Manage union grievance
jtbds.situation: union files formal grievance alleging contract violation; LR manager must respond at Step 1 within contractual timeline, escalate to Step 2/3 if unresolved, and prepare for arbitration if not settled
jtbds.motivation: resolve grievances at lowest step to avoid costly arbitration and preserve labor relations
jtbds.outcome: grievance resolved at step or arbitration scheduled; timeline compliance documented
success_criteria: Step 1 response within contractual deadline
all step responses documented
arbitration demand responded to within CBA deadline
grievance file maintained for contract term

jtbds.title: Issue WARN Act notice for mass layoff
jtbds.situation: planned RIF of 50+ employees at a single site triggers WARN Act 60-day advance notice obligation to employees, union, and state rapid response coordinator; WARN must be analyzed for exceptions
jtbds.motivation: comply with WARN or document applicable exception to avoid 60-day back-pay liability
jtbds.outcome: WARN notices issued or exception documented; state rapid response notified; RIF executed
success_criteria: WARN applicability determined before announcing RIF
notices delivered 60 days before layoff effective date (or exception documented)
state rapid response unit notified
notice copies retained

jtbds.title: Manage EEO-1 and AAP reporting
jtbds.situation: annual EEO-1 Component 1 filing requires aggregating headcount by race/ethnicity/gender/job category from HRIS and submitting to EEOC portal; federal contractor AAP requires annual written affirmative action program
jtbds.motivation: meet EEOC and OFCCP filing deadlines to avoid compliance findings
jtbds.outcome: EEO-1 submitted by deadline; AAP updated and signed; HRIS data validated
success_criteria: HRIS data validated and corrected
EEO-1 filing submitted by EEOC deadline
AAP updated and signed by establishment
OFCCP audit file current

jtbds.title: Conduct job evaluation and classification
jtbds.situation: new or significantly changed role requires job evaluation to determine FLSA exempt/non-exempt status, grade, and pay range; analyst must collect job content data, apply evaluation methodology, benchmark to market
jtbds.motivation: ensure accurate FLSA classification to avoid wage-and-hour liability and maintain internal pay equity
jtbds.outcome: classification documented; grade and range established; FLSA status assigned with rationale
success_criteria: job content data collected from hiring manager
evaluation methodology applied consistently
FLSA status determined with legal review
grade and range benchmarked to market data

jtbds.title: Validate and process payroll change request
jtbds.situation: manager submits payroll change (salary adjustment, retroactive pay, deduction change); specialist must validate authorization, calculate impact, apply to payroll system before cutoff, and confirm employee receives correct pay
jtbds.motivation: ensure pay changes are authorized, accurate, and processed in the correct pay period
jtbds.outcome: change applied to payroll; employee receives correct pay; HRIS updated
success_criteria: authorization verified before processing
retroactive calculation correct
change applied before payroll cutoff
confirmation sent to employee and manager

jtbds.title: Manage executive compensation program
jtbds.situation: annual board compensation committee cycle requires benchmarking CEO and NEO pay, designing annual and long-term incentive programs, preparing proxy disclosure, and obtaining committee approval before grants
jtbds.motivation: attract and retain executive talent within ISS/Glass Lewis pay-for-performance standards
jtbds.outcome: incentive plans approved by committee; grants made; CD&A filed with proxy
success_criteria: NEO pay benchmarked to peer group
AIP and LTI plan designs approved by committee
grant date and amount documented
CD&A disclosure drafted for proxy

jtbds.title: Process workers compensation claim (HR)
jtbds.situation: employee reports workplace injury; HR must record on OSHA 300 log, file first report of injury with insurer, coordinate light duty, and manage RTW with restrictions
jtbds.motivation: protect injured employee, meet OSHA recording obligations, and control WC costs through early RTW
jtbds.outcome: OSHA 300 log updated; first report filed; RTW plan in place; WC adjuster briefed
success_criteria: injury reported to insurer within 24 hours
OSHA 300 log updated if recordable
light duty offered if available
RTW plan developed within 5 days

jtbds.title: Manage succession planning
jtbds.situation: annual succession review requires identifying high-potential employees, assessing readiness for key roles, creating individual development plans, and presenting slate to executive team and board for critical positions
jtbds.motivation: reduce key-person risk and ensure leadership pipeline for critical roles
jtbds.outcome: succession slates presented to board; IDPs created; HRIS updated with readiness ratings
success_criteria: all critical roles have at least one ready-now successor identified
IDPs created for all high-potentials
succession slates presented to board
readiness ratings updated in HRIS

jtbds.title: Manage HCM system implementation
jtbds.situation: new HCM platform requires data migration, process redesign, integration build (payroll, benefits, ATS), testing, and change management before go-live
jtbds.motivation: replace legacy system without payroll disruption or data loss during cutover
jtbds.outcome: go-live complete; parallel payroll run validated; integrations confirmed; legacy decommissioned
success_criteria: data migration validated in UAT
parallel payroll run shows zero variances
all integrations confirmed in production
change management training completed before go-live

jtbds.title: Manage performance improvement plan
jtbds.situation: employee is placed on PIP for below-standard performance; HRBP must draft measurable goals, set review cadence, document manager observations, and determine outcome at end of PIP period
jtbds.motivation: give employee a genuine opportunity to improve while creating documented basis for separation if performance does not improve
jtbds.outcome: PIP completed; employee improved or separated with documentation; legal review signed off
success_criteria: PIP goals are SMART and documented
manager check-ins documented on schedule
outcome (pass/extended/separation) documented
legal review completed before separation
